name: author-automations-social
description: Create and schedule social media posts, run AI campaigns, and manage your Author Automations Social account from Claude Code or Claude Cowork. Bundled remote MCP server — no local install or runtime needed. Supports 15 platforms including Instagram (with Trial Reels), TikTok, Threads (topic chains), YouTube Shorts, and more.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Generate at https://authorautomations.social/dashboard/settings → Claude Connector → Generate credential pair. Starts with 'aacw_'.

client_secret.title: Client Secret
client_secret.description: The other half of the credential pair. Starts with 'aacs_'. Shown only once when generated — copy carefully.
